message:
feat(cli): expand doctor command and add plan builder capabilities

Extend the wa CLI with comprehensive diagnostic and planning features:

Doctor command enhancements:
- Add system resource checks (disk, memory)
- Add configuration validation
- Add storage health checks
- Add integration status (cass, ntm, etc.)
- Structured JSON output for robot mode

Plan builder additions:
- Support for building action plans from workflow definitions
- Plan validation and serialization
- Hash computation for plan deduplication

The doctor command now provides actionable diagnostics
for troubleshooting setup issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
